seo.title: Controlled Stretch - 9 Week Stretch Routine with Autumn Calabrese
seo.description: Increase your flexibility and help ease muscle tension with our Controlled Stretch workout program with trainer Autumn Calabrese. Get started here today!

trainers.bioBodi: Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

data.descriptionShort: Stretch your body and relax your mind with light, restorative routines.
data.descriptionLong: Ease muscle tension, help boost blood flow, and reframe your mind with 10-minute restorative, light stretching and breathing routines to help you prepare for better sleep and recovery.

modules.title: Is Controlled Stretch for Me?
modules.content: Giving your body a proper recovery after workouts is one of the most important things you can do for your long-term health. These breakthrough, short routines will help clear your head, relax your muscles, and get you primed for a good night’s sleep, so you’re ready for the next day.

modules.title: Controlled Stretch Is More Than Stretching
modules.content: Controlled Stretch combines restorative, light stretching with breathing exercises to help you prepare for better sleep and recovery. Ideally, these are done in the evening and paired with the 9 Week Control Freak program, but they can be added to any workout day, or done alone. You’ll help boost blood flow, ease muscle tension, and enhance your natural repair processes for better results so you’re ready to give everything to your next workout.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.
